resources.string: Maintains SSH connections and the loaded public keys.
Tap this box to collect random data: %1$d%% complete.
To ensure randomness during key generation, move your finger randomly across the box below.
Enter a passphrase to encrypt the key being exported.
Enter the password to decrypt the key \'%1$s\' (%2$s).
Use the same password for encryption.
Tap “Menu” to create or import key pairs.
Enter your password to unlock the key \'%1$s\'.
A key with this nickname already exists.
Note: The password field can be left blank.
Allow the remote host to\nuse the key \'%1$s\'?
WARNING: THE IDENTIFICATION OF THE REMOTE HOST HAS CHANGED!
SOMEONE MAY BE DOING SOMETHING SINISTER!\nSomeone could be intercepting your communications right now (a man-in-the-middle attack)!\nIt is also possible that the host key has just been changed.
The host has disconnected.\nClose the session?
Are you sure you want to continue connecting?
The authenticity of host \'%1$s\' cannot be verified.
The key fingerprint for host %1$s is %2$s.
Network connection lost, waiting to reconnect…
Network restored, but IP address has changed. Reconnecting…
Size of the scrollback buffer to be stored in memory for each console.
Add a font from Google Fonts by name.
Import a font file from your device (TTF, OTF).
Keep backups of the private keys using Android’s backup feature.
Download failed, tap to try again.
Tap the console to display the title bar and access the menu.
Swipe the left third of the screen to send the \"page up\" or \"page down\" command to the terminal.
Hide the status bar when in console mode.
On hardware keyboards, the number keys send F1–F10 when the Shift key is pressed.
On software keyboards, the number keys send F1–F10 when the Ctrl key is pressed.
You can also change the font size in the profile settings.
Keep unlocked keys in memory until the backend service is terminated.
Keep the background service running to maintain your connection.
Keep your sessions open even when you switch to other apps.
Prevent the screen from turning off while working in a console.
Prevent Wi-Fi from turning off during an active session.
Vibrate when sending arrow key commands; helpful for connections with high latency.
Play sound when a terminal alert is triggered.
Vibrate when a terminal alert occurs.
Send a notification when a terminal running in the background emits a bell sound.
Use the keys on the right side.
Use the keys on the left side.
Commands to run on the remote server after authentication.
This may help with slower network connections.
Disable this setting to use port forwarding only.
Try to reconnect to the host if the connection is lost.
Close immediately after the remote connection is terminated, without prompting the user.
Store the login password securely for automatic authentication.
Select a profile to apply its terminal settings.
Force the terminal to a specific size (columns x rows) instead of automatically adjusting to fit the screen.
No profiles yet. Tap the + button to create one.
Are you sure you want to delete \'%s\'?
No app available to open this URL.
This type of URL is not supported.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
Are you sure you want to disconnect from all connected hosts?
Authentication using the saved password failed.
Attempting ‘public key’ authentication using any available public keys.
The selected public key is invalid. Please try selecting the key again in the host editor.
Attempting public key authentication using a specific public key.
The biometric key \'%1$s\' has been invalidated. This can happen when new fingerprints are registered on the device. Please generate a new key.
[Your host does not support ‘password’ or ‘keyboard-interactive’ authentication.]
The session will not start because of the host’s settings.
Error! The local shell is not available on this phone.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"? This action cannot be reversed.
No custom schemes exist. Tap “New Scheme” to create one.
This will reset all 256 colours to their default values. This action cannot be reversed.
Built-in schemes are read-only. Duplicate to customize.
Enter the text you want to send to the terminal.
Failed to load port forwarding rules for %1$s: %2$s
Failed to save host configuration for %1$s: %2$s
No port forwarding rules have been configured.
No URLs found in the terminal buffer.
Encrypted keys cannot be unlocked when the system starts.
Protect this key using your fingerprint.
No fingerprint registered. Set up fingerprint in the device settings to use this feature.
Fingerprint protection is only available for RSA and EC keys.
Touch the fingerprint sensor to unlock \'%1$s\'.
The port number must be between 1 and 65535.
The format should be host:port (e.g., localhost:80).
ConnectBot needs notification permission to keep your connections active when you switch apps. Without it, the system may disconnect your connections to conserve battery.
To keep your connections active in the background, please enable notifications for ConnectBot in your device’s settings.
Connections may be dropped if notification permission is not granted.
The connection may be lost when the app is running in the background.
Are you trying to connect to a host on the local network? Grant the necessary permissions for local network access.
Please do not close the app while the migration is in progress.
An error occurred during the database migration: %s
If the problem continues, please report it at %1$s, including the debug log copied above.
Are you sure you want to disconnect from \'%1$s\'?
Are you sure you want to delete the host \'%1$s\'?
Are you sure you want to delete the saved host keys for \'%1$s\'? You will be prompted to verify the host key the next time you connect.
Select which IP address version to use when connecting.
Connect through a different SSH host.
Successfully authenticated to the jump host: %s
Unable to connect to the jump host %1$s: %2$s
Authentication failed for the jump host: %s
Jump host not found in saved hosts.
To report a bug, copy these logs and open a new issue at https://connectbot.org/bug.
Precise colours for machines and people.
A dark theme for the terminal.
An arctic colour palette with a bluish hue.
A clean and comfortable dark mode.
Add custom TERM values for remote servers.
Imported %1$d hosts (%2$d skipped) and %3$d profiles (%4$d skipped).
Require fingerprint, facial recognition, or device PIN when opening the app.
